taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: C#, .NET development, VB.NET, JavaScript, Web APIs
skill_match_scores: C#:0.0, .NET development:0.0, VB.NET:0.0, JavaScript:0.5, Web APIs:1.0
must_have_quals: Strong experience with .NET development (C#, VB.NET) and JavaScript, including building and maintaining full-stack web applications using technologies like Web APIs, AngularJS, HTML/CSS, and SQL databases, Hands-on experience designing, integrating, and working with APIs, including 3rd-party integrations, and maintaining/evolving legacy systems, Solid understanding of software architecture, design principles, and source control tools (e.g., Team Foundation Server), Curiosity and willingness to learn new technologies
preferred_quals: Python experience is a plus, Exposure to modern frontend frameworks, cloud/DevOps practices, or AI-assisted development tools
core_responsibilities: Design, develop, test, deploy, and support business-critical web applications, working across the full stack including databases, backend services/APIs, and web-based user interfaces, Contribute to the migration of functionality from QuoteWerks Desktop to QuoteWerks Web, refactoring and re-architecting features as needed to support scalability, performance, and maintainability, Work within a mature legacy codebase, addressing technical debt while also contributing to new systems and next-generation platform initiatives using modern development practices, Collaborate with engineers and stakeholders to estimate, prioritize, and deliver work, managing individual project timelines and leveraging modern tooling (including AI-assisted development) to improve code quality and engineering efficiency
job_summary: QuoteWerks is a Florida-based software company dedicated to helping small and mid-sized businesses streamline operations and drive growth through quote and proposal software. They are looking for a Software Developer who will build and maintain business-critical web applications used daily by customers. This role involves designing, developing, testing, and supporting web applications while collaborating with engineers and stakeholders.
